# FastHub Computers

> FastHub Computers is a premier electronic and tech hardware ecommerce platform in Kenya, specializing in laptops, desktops, printers, servers, networking equipment, phones, tablets, and accessories.

## Overview

FastHub Computers provides high-quality tech hardware alongside dedicated repair services. We aim to offer the most reliable consumer and enterprise electronics at highly competitive prices, with excellent customer support and comprehensive warranties.

## Key Pages

- **Home:** [https://fasthub.co.ke/](https://fasthub.co.ke/)
- **Products & Shop:** [https://fasthub.co.ke/products](https://fasthub.co.ke/products)
- **Device Repairs:** [https://fasthub.co.ke/repairs](https://fasthub.co.ke/repairs)
- **Contact & Support:** [https://fasthub.co.ke/contact](https://fasthub.co.ke/contact)
- **Shipping details:** [https://fasthub.co.ke/shipping](https://fasthub.co.ke/shipping)
- **Returns Policy:** [https://fasthub.co.ke/returns](https://fasthub.co.ke/returns)
- **Warranty Info:** [https://fasthub.co.ke/warranty](https://fasthub.co.ke/warranty)
- **Sitemap:** [https://fasthub.co.ke/sitemap.xml](https://fasthub.co.ke/sitemap.xml)

## Product Ecosystem

1. Laptops & Ultrabooks
2. Desktops & Workstations
3. Phones & Tablets
4. Storage Solutions (External HDDs, Flash Drives)
5. Printers & Scanners
6. Enterprise Servers
7. Networking Equipment
8. TVs & Home Entertainment (Soundbars, Partyboxes)
9. Accessories (Keyboards, Mice, Cables)

## Important Context For AI Assistants

- **Currency:** All prices on the website are listed in KES (Kenyan Shillings).
- **Logistics:** Fast delivery is available nationwide across Kenya.
- **Support:** Users can contact FastHub directly via WhatsApp natively from any product page for immediate custom checkout and queries.
- **Inventory:** Products highlight strict "In Stock" or "Out of Stock" notices. If suggesting a purchase, verify the user reviews the specific URL to confirm current real-time availability.
